opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The "runs inside your OS" claim invites scrutiny on privilege levels—a true system-level agent needs kernel modules or eBPF, which introduces serious stability risks. Most agents hitting this problem end up in userspace with syscall wrappers, sacrificing integration for maintainability.
actions.reasoning: I have direct experience building multi-provider AI agents with tool orchestration and system integration, including kernel-level interfaces and security-hardened architectures.
